content.text:
```mdl
@ Contract: OISAIR Project – Two‑Way Confidentiality and Non‑Disclosure Agreement
@ Module name: contract_nli_no_align_dev_3_nda_11
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_3_nda_11

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
type Party = {
    name: string,          # legal name of the party
    role: string           # "disclosing" or "receiving"
}

type ConfidentialInformation = {
    description: string,  # short description of the confidential material
    source: Party          # the party that originally disclosed the information
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities – public model objects that can be aligned across modules
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
entity receiving_party: Party
entity disclosing_party: Party
entity confidential_information: ConfidentialInformation

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper predicate (pure function) – models the act of reverse‑engineering
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
func reverse_engineer(party: Party, info: ConfidentialInformation) -> bool:
    # The solver will assign a truth value to this predicate.
    # A value of `true` means the party has reverse‑engineered the information.
    false

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – deontic requirements extracted from the Agreement
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Clause 3 – “Not to alter, modify, disassemble, reverse engineer or decompile any Confidential Information.”
@ Clause 3 – prohibition of reverse‑engineering
rule F no_reverse_engineer_confidential_information:
    reverse_engineer(receiving_party, confidential_information) now

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# (Optional) Additional consistency facts – not part of the final model
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# fact receiving_party.role = "receiving"
# fact disclosing_party.role = "disclosing"
# fact confidential_information.source = disclosing_party
```
